'''Woyiq''' was a loud [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with a large build and connections to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He traveled with a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] accomplice named [[Toalar Yalom Yalom]] and claimed to have be called on by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] presence in [[Il Avali]] on [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]] to help search the rubble of [[I'att Armament]] for survivors.

Though this may be have been true, his goal at the time was to covertly inform [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin]], heiress and fugitive from the weapons complex that no-one had survived the building's explosion. It was a lie planted by Woyiq as a favor to Tinian's lover, [[Daye Azur-Jamin]], a survivor from the blast who felt his "death" would unburden her.
